Equity Research Analyst Note

Subject: Q3 Earnings Preview for Horizon Dynamics Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 198765432W)

Dear Investors,

Our team anticipates that Horizon Dynamics Pte. Ltd. will release its Q3 earnings report on November 15, 2023. We predict a year-over-year revenue increase of 12%, driven by robust demand in their renewable energy segment. Dr. Cynthia Lim, our senior analyst, projects earnings per share to reach SGD 0.85, slightly above the consensus estimate of SGD 0.82.

For further inquiries, please contact Mr. Richard Tan at +65 6123 4567 or via email at richard.tan@financeinsights.sg. As a reminder, please have your NRIC (e.g., S8765432D) ready for verification purposes when discussing proprietary insights.

Best regards,
Equity Research Team
Finance Insights Pte. Ltd.
